notes: Raw regression media is intentionally not committed to keep the source repository lightweight.
Use the release sample pack when you need to validate DJI split-recording matching behavior.

files.name: DJIG0024.mp4
files.role: Base video clip for exact-match SRT and OSD validation

files.name: DJIG0024.osd
files.role: Primary OSD timeline reused by the following split clip

files.name: DJIG0025.mp4
files.role: Later split clip that reuses the earlier OSD timeline
